name: Grilled Marinated Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup fresh lemon juice (or half lemon/lime)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Wipe your brow; that was tough.
3. Cover prepared veggies with the marinade and let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes.
4. Grill the marinated vegetables for about 10 minutes, turning frequently to achieve crosshatch marks.
5. Season with salt and pepper after removing from the grill if desired.
6. This marinade can be made up to two days in advance.
7. Use this marinade with sliced zucchini (on a bias or lengthwise), yellow squash, red bell peppers (thick "julienne"), portobello mushrooms (whole or halved), eggplant (in strips or thick slices), spring onions (whole), and tomatoes (thick slices). Feel free to use other vegetables as desired.
